name: Soft Chocolate Frosting/Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 t Vanilla Extract or 1 Package Vanilla Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, potato starch, and salt.
2. Gradually add boiling water to the dry ingredients while continuously stirring until well combined.
3. Cook over medium heat for one minute, stirring constantly to prevent scorching.
4. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
5. Stir in the chocolate chips until smooth.
6. Add the margarine and vanilla extract (or vanilla sugar) and stir until fully incorporated.
7. Spread the frosting while warm.
